description: Long Description Develop AI models using the latest advancements in LLMs and ensure their seamless integration into application frameworks Optimize existing AI systems and models for improved efficiency and accuracy collaborate closely with data engineers and architects to implement effective data strategies for model training and evaluation Keep up to date with AI research by attending conferences and workshops bringing innovative ideas back to the team Conduct rigorous testing and validation of AI models to ensure they meet quality standards Write clean manageable code and maintain proper documentation for all implemented AI systems Participate in peer code reviews and contribute to team knowledge by providing expertise on coding standards and best practices Our Ideal Candidate Bachelors degree in computer science Artificial Intelligence or related technical fields Masters degree is preferred Certifications or demonstrable experience in specific AI technologies such as TensorFlow or PyTorch and familiarity with cloud services used for AI deployments Deep technical expertise in AI and machine learning particularly in building and deploying LLMs and transformers Experience with RAG pipelines vector embedding and tokenization techniques crucial for developing sophisticated AI systems Strong knowledge of incontext learning finetuning zeroshot learning fewshot learning and prompting techniques Proficiency in programming languages like Python and experience with ML frameworks such as TensorFlow PyTorch and libraries from Hugging Face Experience with cloud services AWS Azure Google Cloud and onpremises deployments focusing on scalability and security of AI deployments Ability to work collaboratively in a fastpaced teamoriented environment'
